provider_query_scope: Manual public web/documentation inspection only; no bulk scraping.
summary: Public and freemium biotech catalyst sources are useful for discovery and event-level timestamp proof, but no observed free/public source passed the full point-in-time completeness and retention contract needed for a promotable Catalyst sleeve.

source_outcome.third_party_calendars: Discovery/trial candidates, non-promotable pending export and retention audit.

blocked_actions: No Catalyst sleeve backtest from public calendars alone.
No promotion from third-party calendar pages without PIT completeness audit.
No assumption that current/future calendar pages contain delisted or failed historical events.
